search.query: index=nucleus_internal sourcetype="nucleus:platform" | sort -_time | head 1 | eval name=coalesce(name,"N/A") | eval version=coalesce(version,"N/A") | eval environment=coalesce(environment,"N/A") | eval region=coalesce(region,"N/A") | eval createdAt=coalesce(createdAt,"N/A") | table name version environment region createdAt

index=nucleus_internal sourcetype="nucleus:tenant" | sort -_time | head 1 | eval tenantId=coalesce(tenantId,"N/A") | eval tenantName=coalesce(tenantName,"N/A") | eval subscriptionTier=coalesce(subscriptionTier,"N/A") | table tenantId tenantName subscriptionTier

| makeresults | eval Key="Application", Value="Nucleus Security for Splunk" | append [| makeresults | eval Key="Integration Type", Value="Nucleus Security REST API"] | append [| makeresults | eval Key="Data Format", Value="JSON"] | append [| makeresults | eval Key="Splunk Compatibility", Value="Splunk Enterprise & Splunk Cloud"] | table Key Value

| makeresults | eval Name="Nucleus Security Website", URL="https://nucleussec.com" | append [| makeresults | eval Name="Nucleus API Documentation", URL="https://api-docs.nucleussec.com/nucleus/docs/"] | append [| makeresults | eval Name="Splunk Documentation", URL="https://docs.splunk.com"] | table Name URL
